---
# IBM Watson OpenScale Utilities
---

`ibm-wos-utils` is a utility library used to create multiple artifacts required by IBM watsonx.governance.

## Important Notice:

- If you are using **IBM watsonx.governance or IBM Watson OpenScale on Cloud**, please install [ibm-wos-utils version 3.0.*](https://pypi.org/project/ibm-wos-utils/). Drift and Drift v2 Archives generation requires [scikit-learn v1.3.2](https://pypi.org/project/scikit-learn/1.3.2/).

- If you are using **IBM watsonx.governance or IBM Watson OpenScale on Cloud Pak for Data 5.0.x**, please install [latest ibm-wos-utils version 5.0.*](https://pypi.org/project/ibm-wos-utils/). Drift Archive generation requires [scikit-learn v1.1.1](https://pypi.org/project/scikit-learn/1.1.1/).

- If you are using **IBM Watson OpenScale on Cloud Pak for Data 4.8.x**, please install [latest ibm-wos-utils version 4.8.x](https://pypi.org/project/ibm-wos-utils/). Drift Archive generation requires [scikit-learn v1.1.1](https://pypi.org/project/scikit-learn/1.1.1/).

- If you are using **IBM Watson OpenScale on Cloud Pak for Data 4.7.x**, please install [latest ibm-wos-utils version 4.7.x](https://pypi.org/project/ibm-wos-utils/). Drift Archive generation requires [scikit-learn v1.1.1](https://pypi.org/project/scikit-learn/1.1.1/).

- If you are using **IBM Watson OpenScale on Cloud Pak for Data 4.6.x**, please install [ibm-wos-utils version 4.6.x](https://pypi.org/project/ibm-wos-utils/). Drift Archive generation requires [scikit-learn v1.0.2](https://pypi.org/project/scikit-learn/1.0.2/).

- If you are using **IBM Watson OpenScale on Cloud Pak for Data 4.5.x**, please install [ibm-wos-utils version 4.5.x](https://pypi.org/project/ibm-wos-utils/). Drift Archive generation requires [scikit-learn v1.0.2](https://pypi.org/project/scikit-learn/1.0.2/).

- If you are using **IBM Watson OpenScale on Cloud Pak for Data 4.0.8 or 4.0.9**, please install [ibm-wos-utils version 4.1.x](https://pypi.org/project/ibm-wos-utils/). Drift Archive generation requires [scikit-learn v1.0.2](https://pypi.org/project/scikit-learn/1.0.2/).

- If you are using **IBM Watson OpenScale on Cloud Pak for Data 4.0.0, 4.0.1, 4.0.2, 4.0.3, 4.0.4, 4.0.5, 4.0.6, 4.0.7**, please install [ibm-wos-utils v4.0.34](https://pypi.org/project/ibm-wos-utils/4.0.34/). Drift Archive generation requires [scikit-learn v0.24.2](https://pypi.org/project/scikit-learn/0.24.2/) for these releases.

- IBM is not responsible for any existing vulnerabilities within the third-party dependencies that are required to install the ibm-wos-utils python package.
